---
title: "Education"
---

# Education

<details>
  <summary>Fall 2024</summary>

### Courses

- **Course 1**: Description of course 1.
- **Course 2**: Description of course 2.

### Activities

- **Activity 1**: Description of activity 1.
- **Activity 2**: Description of activity 2.

</details>

<details>
  <summary>Winter 2025</summary>

### Courses

- **Course 1**: Description of course 1.
- **Course 2**: Description of course 2.

### Activities

- **Activity 1**: Description of activity 1.
- **Activity 2**: Description of activity 2.

</details>
